name: Rolls-Royce Holdings plc
description: Rolls-Royce Holdings plc is a pre-eminent industrial technology company with a focus on providing power and propulsion solutions for the aerospace, defense, and energy sectors. The company operates through three core business units: Civil Aerospace, Defense, and Power Systems. Rolls-Royce is a global leader in the development of high-performance aircraft engines and is increasingly focused on sustainable power solutions, including small modular reactors (SMRs) and electrical propulsion. Headquartered in London, the company serves customers in more than 150 countries, maintaining a critical role in global infrastructure and security.
